message:
test(manifest): add comprehensive tests for 9 new Dicklesworthstone tools

Verifies all new tool manifest entries (rch, pt, fsfs, sbh, casr, dsr,
ru, asb, pcr) have: description, installed_check, verify commands,
verified_installer or install steps, and complete web metadata.
64 tests, all passing. Closes bd-bd536.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
